# Qingdao Whaleleap Tech

> Aquaculture microbial preparations, pond-management products, feed additives and cooperation support from Qingdao, Shandong, China.

## Canonical facts
- Website: https://www.whaleleapaqua.com/
- Company: Qingdao Whaleleap Tech
- Location: Qingdao, Shandong, China
- Sales contact: Grace Zhao
- Email: gracezhao2025@gmail.com
- WhatsApp / Zalo: +86 13385327686
- Audiences: distributors, importers, aquaculture farms, feed companies and technical-service partners
